_comment: Template for .cursor/mcp.json (gitignored). Copy this file to .cursor/mcp.json and fill in servers. Secrets via env only. User-level ~/.cursor/mcp.json should hold cross-repo tools; project keys live here. Naming convention: <scope>-<ro|rw>-<purpose> (ro/read = read-only, rw/write = write-capable). Examples below are opt-in — copy from _examples into mcpServers to enable.

proj-rw-cli-review._comment: Example local stdio write-capable orchestration server. Requires approval before running side-effecting tools.
proj-rw-cli-review.approval_note: Required before executing shell commands, modifying files, or dispatching write-capable tools.

proj-ro-fff._comment: Optional local stdio read-only fast file search — https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff . Install fff-mcp binary; on Windows often %LOCALAPPDATA%\fff-mcp\bin\fff-mcp.exe

proj-ro-graphify._comment: Optional local stdio read-only knowledge graph — https://github.com/Graphify-Labs/graphify . Requires: uv tool install "graphifyy[mcp]"; build graphify-out/graph.json first (graphify .). Tools: query_graph, get_node, get_neighbors, shortest_path, …

proj-ro-docs._comment: Example remote HTTP read-only MCP server. Remote examples are disabled by default; set enabled=true only after review.

proj-rw-issues._comment: Example remote HTTP write-capable MCP server using token/OAuth-style authorization from env only.
proj-rw-issues.approval_note: Required before creating, updating, deleting, or dispatching issue tracker actions.
